text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
She knows exactly how to move<n>every part of her
body—an<n>indispensable skill for a performer!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Maybe we could make<n>use of that
stage set... I'll ask the<n>crew!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Light Hello seems to be greatly<n>moved and
inspired after watching<n><chrname> train.
